body:
This PR:
- Removes most abstract types from most structs (149e4cc0)
- Removes `Symbol`s from broadcasted expressions (4750c500, ca2cf0e1)
- Fixes some types and mark GPU compatibility for some tests (ecf9c205, 00a56e80, 9f4c04b0, c7950a92)

This PR requires ClimaCore 0.11.5 (not released yet at the time of writing). With this PR, **27/28** tests are now passing!

With this PR, the Ozark experiment also runs if one uses CUDA 5 and substitutes Spline1D objects with something that is GPU compatibile
title: More GPU

body:
## Purpose 
1. Introduce the following structure to tendency (and jacobian) updates:
```
function make_exp_tendency!(model)
    update_aux! = make_update_aux(model)
    update_boundary_fluxes! = make_update_boundary_fluxes(model)
    compute_exp_tendency! = make_compute_exp_tendency(model)
    function exp_tendency!(dY,Y,p,t)
        update_aux!(p,Y,t)
        update_boundary_fluxes!(p,Y,t)
        compute_exp_tendency!(dY,Y,p,t)
    end
    return exp_tendency!
end
````

2. Remove all "interaction" functions, as `update_boundary_flux!` methods for land models can be used for this purpose.
## To-do
review
Future PR: propagate to bucket model
Future PR: rename `set_initial_aux!` to `set_initial_cache!` ?
Future PR: add `update_forcing!` call prior to `update_aux!`


## Content
1. move `update_boundary_fluxes!` outside of the "compute tendency" function (affects all standalone models except Bucket, which doesnt use this yet). The default for an AbstractModel is no update (shared_utilities/models.jl).
2. Adds the call to `update_boundary_fluxes!` into the full implicit and explicit tendency functions, after calling `update_aux!` (shared_utilities/models.jl)
3. Adds it to the Jacobian update functions (shared_utilities/models.jl, standalone/Soil/rre.jl)
4. define a method of `make_update_boundary_fluxes` for `SoilCanopyModel` and other integrated models. This take the place of "interactions_update_vars!" (src/integrated/*.jl). The default is no additional variables and calling `update_boundary_fluxes!` for each component model. (ClimaLSM.jl/src/ClimaLSM.jl)
6. Remove "interaction" naming everywhere - but we still allow for additional aux vars to be added in integrated models (`lsm_aux_vars`)
7. Updated the LSM tutorial as well as added back in the model tutorial explaining AbstractModels.
8. Update tests

Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Next steps of boundary vars
